Centre Hostel Transport ADMISSIONS ERP IQAC ALUMNI CAREER QUICK LINKS Grievance Redressal Committee Anti Ragging Committee Student Welfare Counsellor Committee Anti Ragging Committee SC/ST Cell Contact STUDY IN INDIA X TNEACODE 2739 Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 COMPUTER SCIENCE AND ENGINEERING (ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE & MACHINE LEARNING) 0 LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 0 + RECRUITERS 0 + PUBLICATIONS 0 + PATENTS 44LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 120+ RECRUITERS 10+ PUBLICATIONS 10+ PATENTS PROGRAM SCOPE Shape the future with intelligent machines

. Fuse your CS foundation with AI & ML. Design, build, and deploy game-changing systems in CSE-AI & ML. Dive deep into Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, Generative AI and Reinforcement learning – the AI & ML algorithms that unlock the secrets hidden within data. AI & ML are pushing the boundaries of intelligence. Young engineers with a data interest can join the mission to shape tomorrow’s intelligent systems. LEARNING SCOPE Students will understand how to gain insights through intellectual curiosity by learning diverse technologies, including the OOPS Concept, Data Structures, DBMS, Operating Systems, Networks, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, and Generative AI

. CAREER PROGRESSION AI and ML revolution is sweeping across industries, igniting a surge of thrilling career prospects for students. Imagine leveraging your skills in healthcare, finance, astronomy, business, social media, and the internet of things—all while wielding the power of AI and ML! From data scientists deciphering hidden patterns to software developers building the future, these exciting roles will put you at the forefront of innovation. VISION To pioneer Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning education through Innovation & Experienced Learning, Developing Professionals who excel in Intelligence Systems and Society. MISSION Evolve curriculum and delivery approaches to provide broad exposure to learners to gain adequate knowledge in their field of study

. MISSION Evolve curriculum and delivery approaches to provide broad exposure to learners to gain adequate knowledge in their field of study. Provide opportunities for faculty members to enhance their domain knowledge and skills required for the programs offered. Establish connections with local, national and global experts to share, utilize and exchange domain expertise. Conduct Outreach activities for the society that involve the use of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning solutions to address with societal issues. Create and provide a conducive ecosystem and facilities for offering education related to Artificial Intelligence

. Create and provide a conducive ecosystem and facilities for offering education related to Artificial Intelligence. PROGRAM DETAILS Program Educational Objectives PEO1: Graduates will have successful careers in AI and ML-related fields, including positions such as Data Scientists, Machine Learning Engineers, AI Researchers and Consultants. PEO2: Graduates will recognize the dynamic nature of AI and ML technologies and engage in continuous learning to stay abreast of the latest advancements, tools, and techniques in the field. PEO3: Graduates will have the knowledge and skills to identify opportunities for applying AI and ML in various domains, potentially founding startups, or contributing to the growth and competitiveness of existing organizations

. Program Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required

. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment

. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences

. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Program Specific Outcomes PSO1: Apply Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning techniques to design systems that support informed decision-making through data analysis and pattern recognition

. PSO2: Integrate Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision and Natural Language Processing with modern tools to develop effective solutions for complex data interpretation tasks. Dr.A.Babu Karuppiah B.E., M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 12.06.2024 Areas of Specialization Wireless Sensor Networks Dr.A.Babu Karuppiah is passionate about leveraging technology to create prototypes that address pressing societal issues. He has guided several students to participate in and received numerous accolades in various project competitions. Notably, one of the project received first prize from the District Collector of Madurai at the district-level project competition "Skill Summit 2017" for the project on "Block Detection in Sewage System and Removal Using Snake Technique"

. He was also a finalist in the prestigious 8th India Innovation Initiative – i3 National Fair 2016 and won the first prize at the district level for the "Biometric Assisted e-Health Record for Pregnant Women and Chronic Patients" project in 2015

. He had acted as Principal Investigator for several projects, titled “Biometric Assisted e -Health Record for Pregnant Women and Chronic Patients linking Primary Health Centres (PHCs) and Government Hospitals using Cloud Computing” funded by MSME for a worth of Rs.10 lakhs (July 2023), project titled “Lifesaving IoT-based Hazardous Gas Monitoring and Drainage Block Detection & Removal System to Prevent Manual Scavenging” funded by MSME for a worth of Rs.15 lakhs (June 2022), a DST-funded project titled “Lifesaving IoT- based Hazardous Gas Monitoring and Drainage Block Detection & Removal System to Prevent Manual Scavenging” worth Rs.10 lakhs (February 2019)

. He has received a grant of Rs.15.42 lakhs for a project titled “Decentralized Grid Computing for Intrusion Detection in Wireless Sensor Networks for Military Personnel” from DRDO, New Delhi (February 2014) and anther grant of Rs.5.26 lakhs to organize an AICTE-sponsored two-week FDP on “Deep Learning and IoT” (November 2019). He hold 2 patents under his credit

. He hold 2 patents under his credit. He has won second prize in the “MY” program conducted by Velammal College of Engineering and Technology, Madurai (April 2016 and first prize in the district-level project competition, “The Honourable Chief Minister's Award for Excellence in eGovernance” for the project titled “Biometric Assisted e – Health Record for Pregnant Women and Chronic Patients linking Primary Health Centres (PHCs) and Government Hospitals using Cloud Computing” (November 2015). He has actively participated in contests conducted by Toastmasters International Club. He is also a finalist in the Best Techno Faculty category conducted by ICTACT, Tamil Nadu during the ICTACT Bridge 2014 conference (February 2014)

. He is also a finalist in the Best Techno Faculty category conducted by ICTACT, Tamil Nadu during the ICTACT Bridge 2014 conference (February 2014). Dr.V.Karunakaran M.E., Ph.D D.O.J : 09.06.2023 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing and Generative AI Dr. V. Karunakaran has 17+ years of teaching experience. He has published more than 30 research papers in International Journals and International Conferences and his research interests include Deep Learning, Optimization Techniques and Machine Learning. He has delivered over 10 talks on technical topics and conducted hands-on workshops in the domain of Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, Hadoop and Spark

. He is a reviewer for reputed journals and has guided more than 20 projects in the domain of Image processing, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing and Machine learning. Dr.N.Varatharajan M.E., Ph.D D.O.J : 11.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Network Security, WSN With over 14 years of experience in Teaching and Mentoring students in the academic field, I possess a solid foundation in technical education, enriched by an active portfolio of research and innovation. My primary research interests lie in Network Security and Wireless Sensor Networks. My academic accomplishments include 3 published patents, several Scopus-indexed research articles, a Scopus-indexed book chapter, a published book, and around 15 conference presentations

. To stay abreast of emerging technologies, I have pursued numerous certifications through reputed platforms like NPTEL, in domains such as Cloud Computing, Design Thinking, Internet of Things, Design and Analysis of Algorithms, and Database Management Systems. Dr.K.Kathiresan M.Tech., Ph.D D.O.J : 02.05.2024 Areas of Specialization Data Analytics, Deep Learning, Computer Vision Mr. Kathiresan K has 15+ years of teaching experience. His current research is based on Image Processing, Regression Testing, Deep Learning, Computer Vision and Data Analytics. He love to learn and teach data analysis and prediction techniques of Data Science. He has published more than 15 research papers in reputed journals and conferences with 3 patents published

. He has published more than 15 research papers in reputed journals and conferences with 3 patents published. He is also a CISCO Certified Academic Instructor in ITN and RSE level and acted as a resource person to the various institutions for workshops and FDP. Ms.P.Preethi M.E.,(Ph.D) D.O.J : 12.06.2024 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Deep Learning Ms.P.Preethi has an M.E. degree with over 11 years of teaching experience and is currently pursuing her research degree at Anna University. She has published 1 SCI Paper,5 Scopus Indexed Conference Papers and Published 3 Patents. She is Certified by the IUCEE Engineering Education Program and by AWS (Data Engineer). Guided around 10 projects in various Domains like Machine Learning, Network security and Cloud computing

. Guided around 10 projects in various Domains like Machine Learning, Network security and Cloud computing. Trained in various workshops organized by IIT Bombay and IIT Kharagpur. She is also certified with a Band score of 8/9 in the IELTS examination 2022. Ms.S.Sindhuja M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 03.07.2024 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Deep Learning Ms.S.Sindhuja is currently pursuing her Ph.D degree in the domain of Deep Learning. She has 10+ years and 8 months of experience in teaching. She has published 2 books, 9 Papers and published a patent too. Ms.T.Kalaivani M.E.,(Ph.D) D.O.J : 26.07.2024 Areas of Specialization Artificial Intelligence,Machine Learning,Image Processing Ms

. Ms.T.Kalaivani M.E.,(Ph.D) D.O.J : 26.07.2024 Areas of Specialization Artificial Intelligence,Machine Learning,Image Processing Ms. Kalaivani T is currently working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. She holds a B.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Nandha Engineering College, Anna University, Erode, and an M.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering with a specialization in Software Engineering from Anna University Regional Campus, Coimbatore. She is currently pursuing her research in Coral Reef Resilience at Anna University

. She is currently pursuing her research in Coral Reef Resilience at Anna University. With over 8 years of academic experience and 3 years of industry experience as a Technical Trainer and Developer, She is a dedicated educator and passionate technologist. She has imparted company-specific technical training to students, equipping them with specialized skills in Android Development, Java, and Front-End Design through customized training modules. She has also conducted several hands-on workshops in Android application development, fostering practical learning environments. As part of her technical contributions, she has developed and tested four Android applications, with feature enhancements implemented in three of them

. She has published 8 research papers and holds 4 patents, including 1 granted patent. She is also the author of a book titled “Mastering Machine Learning”. Her areas of expertise include Object-Oriented Programming using Java, algorithmic problem solving with C and Python, Data Science, and Web Technologies. She is a Wipro Certified Faculty and has been recognized as a mentor for Project-Based Learning (PBL) in .NET Full Stack Development by Wipro Technologies, Hyderabad.She is a lifetime member of IETE (Indian Society for Technical Education) and actively contributes to academic and technical excellence through mentoring and knowledge-sharing

. Ms.G.Sharmila M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 02.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Java Programming, Data Analytics With over four years of experience in teaching and mentoring students in the academic field, I bring a strong foundation in technical education, underpinned by an active portfolio of research and innovation. My core research interests include Cloud Computing and Quantum Computing, areas in which I continue to expand my knowledge and contribute through scholarly work. I have published three patents and a Scopus-indexed conference paper, reflecting my commitment to research excellence

. I have published three patents and a Scopus-indexed conference paper, reflecting my commitment to research excellence. To stay updated with emerging technologies, I have completed several certifications from reputed platforms such as NPTEL, covering domains like Cloud Computing, Big Data Analytics, Internet of Things (IoT), Database Management Systems, Java Programming, and Foundations of Cloud, Edge, IoT, and Machine Learning. In addition, I have gained practical industry exposure through training programs at Virtusa (Selenium Testing) and NTT Data (Data Science), further enriching my technical and pedagogical approach. Ms.G.Sandhya B.E., M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 02.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Cloud Computing, Internet of Things Ms. G

. Ms.G.Sandhya B.E., M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 02.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Cloud Computing, Internet of Things Ms. G. Sandhya holds a Master of Engineering (M.E.) degree and brings over 9 years of teaching experience to her academic and professional endeavors. She was a University Rank Holder in her postgraduate program, reflecting her strong academic foundation.
